form_data.safe_behaviors: I observed a person with a ladder, and the ladder was properly tied off.
form_data.at_risk_behaviors: I observed someone from the painting department on a ladder that was not tied off. They were four feet above ground on the ladder, which is unsafe.
form_data.corrective_action: I spoke with the person who was on the ladder that was not tied off. I mentioned this to them, and the person immediately tied off the ladder.
